title: Filipino-Style Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender chicken and a blend of Filipino spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken and set aside.
Add the garlic, onion, and bay leaves to the pot and cook until the vegetables are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish sauce, patis, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the pot and reduce the heat to low.
Simmer the stew for 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
